basicInfo.name: Nightmare Guan Yu
basicInfo.flavor: Afterwards, Guan Yu stabilized the land, earned the support of the people, and was crowned King Muan. In gratitude, he ruled the realm safely and peacefully.

Normal Attack.desc:
Single Enemy
 - Deals damage equal to 100% of Physical Attack 1 time(s).
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Increases Damage: To 100% of Physical Attack.

Skill 1.name: Crescent Dragon's Fury
Skill 1.desc:
Single Enemy
 - Deals damage equal to 100% of Physical Attack 1 time(s).
 - All Allies
 - Heals HP equal to 20% of the caster's Max HP.
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Increases Damage: To 100% of Physical Attack.

Skill 2.name: Lead the Charge
Skill 2.desc:
Self
 - Grants Continuous Healing for each debuff removed. [Duration: 5 Turn(s)]

Passive.name: Peerless Warrior
Passive.desc:
Self
 - Revives with 100% HP upon falling in battle. [Once per Battle]

profile.story:
As the Power of Destruction spread, world officials could no longer control their greed. They squeezed the lifeblood from the people and bandits ran rampant.
To protect the powerless commoners, Guan Yu gathered soldiers, and countless men were drawn to him by his character and strength.
Together with admirable figures like Zhuge Liang and Zhao Yun, Guan Yu defeated the bandits and brought corrupt officials to justice.
Over time, his fame grew, and many members of the royal family approached him, hoping to have Guan Yu as their subordinate.
Each promised him high office and great wealth in exchange for fighting on their behalf.
However, Guan Yu realized that such people would only plunge the world into greater chaos, and he refused all their offers.
However, one day, Guan Yu meets a member of the royal family at Zhuge Liang's request.
It was Pascal.
Pascal, instead of offering Guan Yu wealth and honor, offered to create a world where the people could live happily in return for his aid.
He accepted and achieved great success in unifying Aisha alongside Pascal, and later, with the support of the people, he was crowned King Muan.
